nodes.name: Sylvia
nodes.summary: Sylvia（Sylvia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如黑頂林鶯、Dohrn's warbler、Abyssinian catbird等7种鸟类。

nodes.name: Dohrn's warbler
nodes.summary: Dohrn's warbler (Sylvia dohrni), also known as Principe flycatcher-babbler, Dohrn's flycatcher, Dohrn's thrush-babbler, is a species of passerine bird in the family Sylviidae that is endemic to the island of Príncipe which lies off the west coast of Africa in the Gulf of Guinea. Formerly placed within the genus Horizorhinus, it is now placed in the genus Sylvia based on the results of molecular phylogenetic studies. The specific name honours Heinrich Wolfgang Ludwig Dohrn. References
